sglang.title: [Feature] Add FlashAttention3 as a backend for VisionAttention
sglang.author: Othame
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


Based on the profiling results here, the current bottleneck limiting VLM inference speed lies in the VisionTransformer , with VisionAttention being a critical component. Optimizing this part is expected to significantly improve overall processing speed.

A preliminary MMMU test on Qwen2

sglang.title: Remove unecessary is_fa3_supported check
sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
We've done fa3 check outside of attention backend, if it's not sm90, we won't turn on FA3.
And is_fa3_supported will be called in each layer's forward_extend
For example, Llama 3.1 8B has 32 layers, each is_fa3_supported took 15us, then 15us * 32 = 0.48ms, while the prefill usually took 2

sglang.author: yhyang201
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
fix #5732
This issue has been fixed in TP, but it still seems to occur during DP.
The problem appears to be caused during deserialization when calling recv_pyobj.
I am currently investigating possible solutions.

sglang.title: Cutlass MLA: Disable split kv due to https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/issues/2274
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A bug NVIDIA/cutlass#2274 was found in the cutlass MLA kernel which can cause incorrect outputs. The test cases didn't catch this because the random input values were too low.
Modifications
Disable split kv for now until the issue is fixed. Increase random input values so that bug can be

vllm.title: [CI] Fix test_collective_rpc
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change is related to #17490. This test didn't run on that PR, so
the failure was missed. This code currently relies on the pickle
fallback, so pickle support must be enabled to use it for now.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [V1] Improve VLLM_ALLOW_INSECURE_SERIALIZATION logging
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a follow-up to #17490 and improves related logging.


If serialization fails, include a pointer to the environment variable
that will enable pickle fallback serialization.


Only log the warning about using insecure serialization once.
Previously we were logging it several times.


Signed-of

vllm.title: [FEAT][ROCm]: Support AITER MLA on V1 Engine
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
AITER MLA Support for V1 Engine
This PR implements AITER MLA attention backend support for the V1 engine. The implementation mirrors the V0 engine's established approach from PR #15893.
This PR also introduces a new environment variable, VLLM_ROCM_EXECUTE_MODEL_TIMEOUT, which specifies the model exe

Update llguidance (>= 0.7.11) to avoid AttributeError (no StructTag) .
When I tested tests/v1/entrypoints/llm/test_struct_output_generate.py with llguidance=0.7.10, I get the error shown below:
AttributeError: module 'llguidance' has no attribute 'StructTag'
Then, I find that only llguidance >= 0.7.
